value.name: Public
value.description: Data that is freely available to everyone. No special protection needed.
value.tooltip: Use for non-sensitive, publicly available data.

value.name: General
value.description: Business data that is not intended for public consumption.
value.tooltip: Use for general business data that doesn't require special protection.

value.name: Confidential
value.description: Sensitive business data that could cause damage if shared with unauthorized people.
value.tooltip: Use for sensitive data that requires encryption and access restrictions.

value.name: Highly Confidential
value.description: Very sensitive business data that would cause significant damage if shared with unauthorized people.
value.tooltip: Use for highly sensitive data requiring the strictest protection.
